name: antigravity-for-codex
description: Use Antigravity CLI from Codex for read-only review, adversarial review, planning, rescue, multi-role review, and opt-in Stop gates with explicit Gemini or Claude model selection.

interface.shortDescription: Antigravity CLI reviews, planning, and stop-gate workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Antigravity for Codex connects Codex to the local Antigravity CLI (`agy`) for independent read-only review, adversarial critique, implementation planning, read-only rescue diagnosis, multi-role review fan-out, lifecycle hooks, release checks, and an opt-in Stop hook review gate. It supports explicit model-provider switching between Gemini and Claude models exposed by Antigravity. Codex remains the implementation authority; Antigravity provides a separate reviewer or planner perspective.
capabilities: Explicit Gemini or Claude model selection
defaultPrompt: Use Antigravity to review the current git changes with the default Gemini model.
Use Antigravity with a Claude model to challenge this implementation plan.
Run a multi-role Antigravity review across correctness, security, tests, release, and adversarial perspectives.
Enable the opt-in Antigravity Stop review gate for this repository.
